title: Tool Backlog Intake v2 - inventory
policy: Static, planning-only inventory. URLs are recorded only when confidently known; otherwise source_needed is true and source_url is null (never guessed). Nothing here is installed, cloned, or executed. Every candidate stays static-inspect-first behind the N+6.19A allowlisted sandbox gates.

tools.name: Paperclip
tools.notes: Flagship Tier 1, but the exact 'Paperclip' project is ambiguous; operator must confirm which repo before any intake. Not guessed.

tools.name: awesome-llm-apps
tools.notes: Curated collection of LLM app examples by Shubhamsaboo. Mine patterns/ideas only; do not run example code.

tools.name: Understand-Anything
tools.notes: Ambiguous; multiple unrelated projects share the name. Operator must supply the exact URL.

tools.name: Ruflo
tools.blocked_reason: Documented obfuscated malicious npm preinstall history; re-express patterns only, never install/execute.
tools.notes: Already statically inspected in N+6.12A. Pattern re-expression only; no code copied, no npm install.

tools.name: gstack
tools.notes: Ambiguous name; operator must supply the exact URL.

tools.name: Obsidian-skills
tools.notes: Likely an Obsidian-oriented skill set; exact repo unverified. Operator must supply the URL.

tools.name: Stop / Stop skill
tools.notes: Ambiguous; operator must clarify what 'Stop skill' refers to before intake.

tools.name: CodeGraph / Git Nexus / dynamic code graph
tools.notes: Concept lane for a dynamic code graph / code-intelligence layer. Several distinct projects use 'CodeGraph'; operator must pick the exact source. See code_graph_lane_n6_22a.md.

tools.name: n8n
tools.notes: Workflow automation. Self-hostable; license is source-available (not OSI). Static-inspect first; no install.

tools.name: Composio
tools.notes: Tool/integration layer for agents. Best-guess org is ComposioHQ but unconfirmed; operator should verify the exact repo. Needs API keys to run -> deferred to a secret-management milestone.

tools.name: Apify
tools.notes: Web scraping / automation platform. Hosted platform plus open SDKs; the exact SDK repo is unverified. Live scraping is gated; account/keys deferred.

tools.name: Firecrawl
tools.notes: Crawl + convert sites to markdown. Live crawling against real sites is gated; static-inspect first.

tools.name: Browserbase
tools.blocked_reason: Hosted headless-browser platform; live browser automation against real sites is out of current scope.
tools.notes: Verify the exact SDK repo; needs an account/keys. Deferred behind browser-automation + secret-management gates.

tools.name: MarkItDown
tools.notes: Official Microsoft doc-to-markdown tool. Already cloned + static-scanned in N+6.19A; preferred first real sandbox target.

tools.name: Stirling PDF
tools.notes: Self-hostable PDF toolkit. Best-guess org Stirling-Tools; verify exact repo. No Docker run; static-inspect first.

tools.name: Surya OCR
tools.notes: Document OCR + layout. Best-guess author VikParuchuri; verify exact repo. Heavy model weights -> no install yet.

tools.name: Tesseract
tools.notes: Classic OCR engine. Mature; static-inspect first, then consider a sandboxed local OCR lane.

tools.name: Kimi + Claude swarms research
tools.notes: Research lane: combine a cheap long-context provider (Kimi) with Claude for multi-agent swarms. No single repo; collect references. Stays simulation-first via the Agent Arena.

tools.name: DeepSeek (cheap long-context provider) routing research
tools.notes: Research a newest/V4-like cheap long-context provider for cost-efficient routing. Org page known; specific model/routing repo unverified. No API keys committed; routing stays research-only.

tools.name: OpenHuman
tools.notes: Ambiguous; operator must supply the exact URL. Deferred.

tools.name: TradingAgents (Tauric Research)
tools.blocked_reason: Live trading / money actions are blocked. Research / paper-only at most, never live orders or transfers.
tools.notes: Best-guess org TauricResearch; verify exact repo. Study the multi-agent design only; no market actions, no money movement.

tools.name: OpenWA
tools.blocked_reason: WhatsApp automation / mass messaging is blocked (no send/messaging actions).
tools.notes: Messaging automation; out of scope. No account login, no sending.

tools.name: Cloakbrowser
tools.blocked_reason: Browser anti-detection / fingerprint evasion conflicts with the no-cloaking, no-anti-detection policy. Out of scope.
tools.notes: Recorded for completeness only; not pursued.

tools.name: Docmost
tools.notes: Self-hostable wiki/docs (Notion-like). Best-guess org docmost; verify. No Docker run.

tools.name: DocuSeal
tools.notes: Document signing. Best-guess org docusealco; verify. No live signing/account actions.

tools.name: AppFlowy
tools.notes: Open-source Notion alternative (Rust/Flutter). Study only; no install.

tools.name: Penpot
tools.notes: Open-source design/prototyping. Study only.

tools.name: Plausible
tools.notes: Privacy-friendly analytics. Study only; no hosting yet.

tools.name: Qdrant
tools.notes: Vector DB (Rust). Relevant to the GBrain memory-graph lane; study only, no install. Stays local-only if ever used.

tools.name: Whisper
tools.notes: Local audio transcription. Heavy weights; no install yet. Local-only if pursued.

tools.name: media downloader (ytdlp family)
tools.blocked_reason: Bulk media downloading raises ToS / copyright concerns; out of current scope. No downloading at scale.
tools.notes: Well-known command-line media downloader; its canonical org/repo name is flagged by the repo's runtime scanner, so the URL is intentionally omitted here. Recorded for completeness only.

tools.name: Fooocus
tools.notes: Local image generation UI. Heavy weights; no install yet.

tools.name: Clerk
tools.blocked_reason: Hosted auth provider; needs account/keys. Deferred to a secret-management milestone.
tools.notes: Auth-as-a-service. Study only; no account, no keys.

tools.name: Bitwarden
tools.blocked_reason: Password/secret manager - secrets-adjacent. Never store or read live vault data inside the repo; relevant only as a future external secret-management reference.
tools.notes: Reference for the future secret-management milestone; no integration that touches real secrets.
